paper.title_en: Matter Maps to Geometry in Gravitational Collapse
paper.abstract_en: We establish an exact bidirectional map between the effective homogeneous interior density of a collapsing star and the exterior metric function in generalized Oppenheimer--Snyder collapse. The Darmois--Israel junction conditions reduce this relation to a purely algebraic form, providing a direct way to reconstruct candidate static geometries and their surface dynamics without solving the corresponding differential field equations separately. Correction powers diagnose models: integer exponents signal ultraviolet completions, while fractional powers identify phenomenological ones. Our framework not only simplifies the construction of regular black holes but also provides a universal benchmark for testing singularity resolution and cosmic censorship in quantum gravity phenomenology.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文提出了一种新颖的映射方法，简化了规则黑洞的构造，并为量子引力现象学中的奇点分辨和宇宙审查提供了基准，高度相关于广义相对论基础。
decision.title_zh: 引力坍缩中物质映射为几何
decision.abstract_zh: 我们在广义奥本海默-斯奈德坍缩中，建立了坍缩恒星的有效均匀内部密度与外度规函数之间的精确双向映射。Darmois-Israel 连接条件将该关系简化为纯代数形式，提供了一种直接重建候选静态几何及其表面动力学的方法，而无需分别求解相应的微分场方程。修正幂次可对模型进行诊断：整数幂次标志着紫外完备化，而分数幂次则标识出唯象模型。我们的框架不仅简化了规则黑洞的构造，还为量子引力现象学中奇点分辨和宇宙审查的检验提供了通用基准。
